category_sources: Official GNU page says GNU Datamash performs numeric, textual and statistical operations on input textual data files.
source_facts.description says tool to perform numerical, textual and statistical operations.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page heading uses GNU datamash at https://www.gnu.org/software/datamash/.
Official manual title uses GNU Datamash at https://www.gnu.org/software/datamash/manual/html_node/index.html.
docs_sources: Official GNU manual page states it is the manual for GNU Datamash.
Official GNU page has Documentation and Help links including Online Datamash Manual.
repo_sources: Official GNU page Source Code section links View GIT Code Repository to https://git.savannah.gnu.org/gitweb/?p=datamash.git and gives clone command git://git.sv.gnu.org/datamash.git.
tags_sources: Official GNU page describes command-line numeric, textual, and statistical operations on textual data files.
